ddls:
CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each territory (e.g., IN-AP, IN-AR, IN-AS) */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the territory */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Total geographical area of the territory */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the territory */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the territory */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the GDP */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each year (e.g., 2005-03) */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for better alignment with financial data and reporting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for better communication and verification */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poverty data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poverty data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poverty data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the browser and operating system used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territory_years" (
  "territory_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory-year association */,
  "territory_id" TEXT /* ID of the territory */,
  "year_id" TEXT /* ID of the year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the specific territory and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territory_years_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territory_years_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poverty data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number to clearly identify different versions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
